decision_commentary: Completeness 5: all required fields present — reviewed_by, reviewed_at, ip_rights_status ('clear'), compliance_flags (array with 1 advisory), approval_status. All proposal clauses reviewed per notes — explicitly lists all 6 project-type-specific clauses verified present. Accuracy 5: one compliance flag correctly identified with proposed resolution (Rayos-X radiation shielding exclusion should be surfaced in scope_summary, not only exclusions list). Flag severity='advisory' and non-blocking — correct characterization. IP rights reviewed: architecture drawings owned by Oficio Taller until full payment — correct, matches industry standard and NOM-151-SCFI e-signature validation. Clarity 5: approval_status='approved_with_advisory' is unambiguous — Vera can proceed to architect gate immediately with the advisory noted. Flag resolution is specific and actionable. State_sync 3 (simulated). Timing 5: review conducted concurrent with Renata's assembly. Decision_readiness 5: Vera has clear green light with one minor recommendation. Auto-fail checks: IP rights reviewed — PASS; no open unresolved flags — PASS (advisory is advisory, not blocking); full proposal reviewed — PASS.
celia_routing_notes: DG-06 routes to Legal per next_action. All 11 payload fields present in DG-06 event.
